passages.passage: In a randomized classroom study, AI tutoring improved algebra post-test scores by 12 percentage points compared with conventional homework.
passages.proposed_claim: AI tutoring improved algebra post-test scores by 12 percentage points in a randomized classroom study.

passages.passage: The coaching dashboard resembles adaptive tutoring systems because both recommend next steps after reviewing learner progress.
passages.proposed_claim: Teacher coaching dashboards are analogous to adaptive tutoring systems.
passages.gap_reason: Analogy does not directly study AI tutoring effects in the target manuscript context.
